verses.2: “Dominion and awe belong to Him Who makes peace in His heights.
verses.3: “Is there any number to His troops? And upon whom does His light not rise?
verses.4: “How then can mankind be righteous with God? Or how can anyone who is born of woman be pure?
verses.5: “If even the moon has no brightness And the stars are not pure in His sight,
verses.6: How much less man, that maggot, And a son of man, that worm!”
